text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is gradually gaining momentum as
more and more people start looking forward to
the event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, <chrname>'s popularity still
leaves a lot to be desired. We're going to have to
try a lot harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, <chrname> is also steadily
growing her fan base and getting closer to
becoming a star Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, <chrname> 's overflowing
appeal is winning hearts left and right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their breakthrough several days prior,
Trainer Kiryuin and Happy Meek are also giving
their all to prepare for the race.
